Nourishing milk • Restoring • Postpartum recovery

Almond, Date & Saffron Milk

A creamy, golden milk of soaked almonds, dates and saffron — rich, restoring and lightly sweet.
Makes 1 large mug
Time 10 min
Caffeine none
For you · a nourishing treat
When to drink Daytime or early evening — a rich, satisfying cup between meals or as a gentle dessert.

Why this heals you

  • Almonds — protein, healthy fat & vitamin E verified
  • Dates — iron and natural sweetness verified
  • Saffron — traditionally warming & mood-lifting tradition
  • Cardamom — aromatic; aids digestion tradition
Ingredients
8, soakedAlmonds (peeled)
2, pittedMedjool dates
pinchSaffron threads
pinchCardamom
1 cupMilk of choice
Method
1
Soak

Soak 8 almonds overnight (or 10 min in hot water), then slip off the skins.

2
Blend

Blend the almonds, 2 dates, cardamom and 1 cup milk until smooth.

3
Warm with saffron

Warm gently, crumble in a pinch of saffron, steep 2 min. Sip.

Just for you, Mum

Rich, sweet and restoring — the kind of cup that feels like being looked after. The dates do the sweetening, so no sugar needed.

Good to know
BestBetween meals or as a light dessert.
RicherA splash of coconut milk or 1 tsp ghee.
Why we say this
Almond & date nutrition (protein, iron) is verified; saffron’s warming/mood framing is traditional and honestly labelled.
Main Meals
Snacks
Drinks
Desserts
Food, not medical advice · non-diagnostic · made for this season of motherhood
